title: US seizes hundreds of FIFA World Cup illegal streaming domains
abstract: Fed up with secretly watching the World Cup and fearing discovery? The FBI has taken a firm stance, seizing hundreds of illegal streaming domains for the tournament. No more hiding; enjoy the game in full view!
abstract_zh: 你是不是也厌倦了那些偷偷摸摸看球赛，担心被发现的时刻？美国FBI这次可真是下重手了——一口气缴获几百个非法直播世界杯的网站域名！从此，想看球赛再也不用躲躲藏藏，尽情享受吧！
